name: YouTubeDLBot
description: A high-performance YouTube downloader Telegram bot with parallel MTProto uploads, split file support, and JS challenge resolution via Deno.

API_ID.description: Telegram API ID. Get from my.telegram.org.

API_HASH.description: Telegram API Hash. Get from my.telegram.org.

OWNER_ID.description: Telegram User ID of the bot owner. Get from @ItsSmartToolBot using /info.

DEVELOPER_USER_ID.description: Telegram User ID of the developer. Used for error reports.

LOG_CHANNEL_ID.description: Telegram channel ID where error reports are sent. Must be negative for supergroups.

UPDATE_CHANNEL_URL.description: Telegram channel URL for bot updates. Without https://.

COMMAND_PREFIXES.description: Command prefixes the bot listens to, comma separated.
